title: SpaceX skeptics have added reason for concern after Musk comments diverge from IPO filing
summary_full: In a post on X, Elon Musk offered details about SpaceX's deal with Anthropic that weren't included in the company's IPO prospectus.
summary_public: In a post on X, Elon Musk offered details about SpaceX's deal with Anthropic that weren't included in the company's IPO prospectus.
